title: Xin Tangshu: New Book of Tang, Selection 5
description: From Xin Tangshu: New Book of Tang: chapter 5
introduction: From Xin Tangshu: New Book of Tang: chapter 5

translation.text: From Xin Tangshu: New Book of Tang: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
